description_long: This is a bright red pickup truck with a four-door cab and a spacious black cargo bed at the rear. The front features a wide chrome grille, rectangular headlights, and a Chevrolet emblem, while the hood is slightly raised and the windshield is broad. The side profile reveals large, silver wheels, black side mirrors, and door handles, with a subtle trim line running along the body. The rear view shows a black tailgate handle, red taillights, and a visible trailer hitch, emphasizing its utility. The windows are tinted, and the roof has amber marker lights, suggesting a heavy-duty or work-oriented model. The overall build is robust, with a high ground clearance and a utilitarian yet modern design.
description: A red four-door pickup truck with a black cargo bed, chrome grille, and robust build, featuring silver wheels and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, Chevrolet emblem, rectangular headlights, and raised hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, silver wheels, black side mirrors, and the full length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black cargo bed, tailgate handle, red taillights, and trailer hitch.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, wheels, and the cargo bed.
